/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_format.dir/src/format_wrapper.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/test_format.dir/tests/test-format-generated.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_format.dir/tests/test-format-additional.cpp.o" -o test_format  /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
